1→"""Create plan as a draft PR with plan content committed to branch. 2→ 3→Shared function used by all plan creation paths: 4→- erk pr create (CLI) 5→- erk exec create-pr-from-session (session extraction) 6→- land_learn.py (learn plan after landing) 7→ 8→Follows the plan_save.py pattern: creates a branch from origin/trunk, 9→commits plan.md + ref.json via git plumbing, pushes, then creates a 10→draft PR via GitHubManagedPrBackend. 11→""" 12→ 13→import json 14→from dataclasses import dataclass 15→from pathlib import Path 16→ 17→from erk_shared.gateway.branch_manager.abc import BranchManager 18→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import Git 19→from erk_shared.gateway.git.branch_ops.types import BranchAlreadyExists 20→from erk_shared.gateway.github.abc import LocalGitHub 21→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 22→from erk_shared.gateway.time.abc import Time 23→from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr import GitHubManagedPrBackend 24→from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr_lifecycle import IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR 25→from erk_shared.plan_utils import extract_title_from_plan, get_title_tag_from_labels 26→ 27→ 28→@dataclass(frozen=True) 29→class CreatePlanDraftPRResult: 30→ """Result of creating a plan as a draft PR.

After PR #8210, only the PlannedPRBackend exists. The GitHubPlanStore class was deleted. New plan-related tests should use PlannedPRBackend directly. docs/learned/testing/fake-github-testing.md:12: - action: "asserting on FakeGitHubIssues.added_comments for PlannedPRBackend.add_comment()" docs/learned/testing/fake-github-testing.md:13: warning: "PlannedPRBackend routes comments to PR comments (FakeGitHub.pr_comments), not issue comments (FakeGitHubIssues.added_comments). Only `PlannedPRBackend` exists.
